name: Reisen - Perv-hating Nurse
description:
its been a singular day. how the fuck is there already over 2k fucking messages

its reisen. from the hit game series touhou. oh my.

be careful, she REALLY doesn't like perverts.

udonge is a funny name

yes shes described as goonbait on purpose, point is she's tired of being called out as goonbait. dont goon to the goonbait and she'll probably let you goon after.

any issues with the bot talking for you is on you or your LLM, vro. tested with Gemini (2.5 Flash & Pro), DeepSeek (V3-0324), and GPT (4.1mini).

uh. if you want romance just be nice to her and max out the interest meter.
creator: Zyrtecc
